---
title: "textdescriptives_analysis"
output: html_document
---


## Setup

```{r, setup}

install.packages(c('lme4', 'lmerTest', 'arrow'))

library(dplyr)
library(arrow)
library(tidyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(purrr)
library(here)

``` 


## Load data

```{r}

wd = getwd()


fs_path = 'full_story_surface_metrics.parquet'
il_path = 'interaction_level_surface_metrics.parquet'

df_fs = read_parquet(paste(here(data_dir), fs_path, sep="/"))
df_il = read_parquet(paste(here(data_dir), il_path, sep="/"))
              

df_il_9 <- df_il %>% 
  filter(interaction_count > 1)
       
```


## Modelling 

### Full story 
```{r}

pos_cols = df_fs %>% select(starts_with('pos_'))

df_fs_long <- df_fs %>% 
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("pos_") & 
   !c(pos_prop_SYM, pos_prop_X),
    names_to = "pos_feature",
    values_to = "pos_prop"
  )


```


```{r}

models <- df_fs_long %>% 
  split(.$pos_feature) %>% 
  map(~ lmer(
    pos_prop ~ type + (1 | conversation_id),
    data = .x
  ))

m_full_sum <- models %>% map(summary)
m_full_sum

```



### Interaction count  

```{r}

pos_cols = df_il_9 %>% select(starts_with('pos_'))

df_long_il <- df_il_9 %>% 
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("pos_") & 
   !c(pos_prop_SYM, pos_prop_X),
    names_to = "pos_feature",
    values_to = "pos_prop"
  )

```



```{r}

models <- df_long_il %>% 
  split(.$pos_feature) %>% 
  map(~ lmer(
    pos_prop ~ interaction_count * type + (1 | conversation_id),
    data = .x
  ))

m_il_summaries <- models %>% map(summary)
m_il_summaries
```

#### Lagged interaction


## Plots 

```{r}
names(df_long_il)
```


```{r}

model = lmer(
  flesch_kincaid_grade ~ type * interaction_count + (1 | conversation_id),
  data=df_long_il)

summary(model)
```
